REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER WESTERN PROGRESSIVE, LLC MOTION FOR RECOVERY OF REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS AND REQUEST FOR DISCHARGE AND DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. PETITIONER SHALL RECOVER ITS FEES AND COSTS AND DEPOSIT $19,648.50 WITH THE COURT. PETITIONER SHALL BE DISCHARGED AND DISMISSED AFTER THE FUNDS ARE DEPOSITED WITH THE COURT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion By Petitioner Western Progressive, Llc For Recovery Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs And Request For Discharge And Dismissal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities ; Declaration Of Katherine S. Walker In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER WESTERN PROGRESSIVE, LLC's Motion For Recovery Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs And Request For Discharge And Dismissal - This motion will be heard on April 10, 2017 at 9:30am in department 501, the real property/housing court. In the future all motions in this case should be noticed to be heard in department 501. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Petitioner Western Progressive, Llc For Recovery Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs And Request For Discharge And Dismissal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities ; Declaration Of Katherine S. Walker In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Katherine S. Walker (714-848-7920) for Petitioner Western Progressive, LLC.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Western Progressive, Llc Motion For Recovery Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs And Request For Discharge And Dismissal is GRANTED. Petitioner shall recover its fees and costs and deposit $19,648.50 with the Court. Petitioner shall be discharged and dismissed after the funds are deposited with the Court. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
